creator: spil.oss@googlemail.com
text:
Workaround:
sysctl net.link.bridge.pfil_member=0
sysctl net.link.bridge.pfil_bridge=0

Windows7 client booted and now OK

Forgot to mention my network-setup:
bridge0, members ath0 (hostap) and bge0

bridge0 has 6 aliases for various jails, all in the same subnet
